_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: High-density lipoprotein (HDL) concentration was significantly increased as was triglyceride levels, while low-density lipoprotein (LDL) was reduced nearly 2-fold in Nf1 +/− mice
details: HDL concentration significantly increased, triglyceride levels increased, LDL reduced nearly 2-fold compared to WT mice
